Metadata.title: Sebastian Kolbusz | Senior Frontend Engineer & Web Architect
Metadata.description: Senior Frontend Engineer in Zakopane specializing in high-performance Next.js apps and cinematic web experiences that elevate the digital presence of global SaaS and local businesses.

hero.name: Sebastian Kolbusz
hero.tagline: Engineering high-performance web applications with a focus on cinematic motion and technical excellence.

bio.title: Sebastian Kolbusz
bio.description: Senior Frontend Engineer with over 6 years of experience building scalable SaaS products and high-end digital appearances.

experience.label: Years of Experience
experience.details: Specializing in the React ecosystem, performance optimization, and refined UI/UX implementation.

location.details: Solving global engineering challenges from the heart of the Tatra Mountains.

philosophy.title: Engineering Mindset
philosophy.details: I focus on simplicity, performance, and accessible architecture. I build systems where technical reliability and clean code are the foundation of brand trust.
philosophy.craft_details: I treat engineering as a craft. It's about creating digital environments that are technically sound, highly responsive, and visually polished.

projects.title: Selected Engineering Work
projects.intro: I focus on creating robust, accessible, and high-performance systems. From rapid prototyping to architecting enterprise-grade SaaS, I build digital experiences designed for long-term maintainability and technical excellence.

zakofy.description: Custom offer presentation platform for Tatra mountain tours. Elevated the client's digital presence through a refined UI and high-performance architecture.

your-krakow-travel.description: Unified offer presentation platform for a premier private tour provider. Centralized fragmented offerings into a cohesive and performant digital identity.

wellezza.description: Digital appearance for a local hair salon. Integrated third-party booking systems into a high-performance, custom-built storefront.

billboard-zakopane.description: Professional platform for a regional advertising leader. Streamlined the client journey with interactive location mapping and a modern technical base.

services.title: Engineering Services
services.intro: Focusing on technical excellence and professional digital appearances. I build websites and applications designed for performance, reliability, and brand trust.
services.limited_availability: * Accepting new projects for late Q1 2026

process.title: The Workflow
process.intro: A transparent engineering process focused on clarity and technical quality.

contact.title: Let's Build Together
contact.tagline: I'm currently accepting new projects. Reach out to discuss how we can build your next high-performance digital presence.
